tracks.rawText: 2:37Murat Uyar - The magic of istanbul [E9p-fd6l43Q]UploadNu-disco and synth-pop track at 120 BPM in the key of G minor, The arrangement features a prominent slap bass line playing syncopated sixteenth-note patterns, A four-on-the-floor kick drum and a crisp snare on beats 2 and 4 drive the rhythm, complemented by sixteenth-note hi-hat patterns and occasional cowbell accents, Bright, staccato electric guitar chords provide rhythmic counterpoint, Analog-style synthesizers perform melodic lead lines with a slight portamento and shimmering pads that swell during transitions, The production uses sidechain compression on the pads and bass to create a pumping effect synchronized with the kick drum, Handclaps are layered on the snare during the main sections, A clean, funky rhythm guitar riff enters periodically with a wah-wah filter effect6PublishRemix
tracks.title: Murat Uyar - The magic of istanbul [E9p-fd6l43Q]

tracks.rawText: 3:42Delirio de Liriosv5.5Reggae clásico de los años 80 con influencias dancehall, ritmo relajado pero enérgico, bajo profundo y cálido, batería con patrón one-drop, guitarra rítmica con staccato, arreglos con teclados tipo órgano jamaicano y toques de sintetizador vintage, voces melódicas y expresivas con estilo caribeño, atmósfera festiva y positiva, mezcla con sensación analógica y reverb espacialMary Jane1PublishRemix
